Commit is a single-track conference for people who build for the web — 30 talks, 8 workshops, and one legendary afterparty.

No FOMO, no room-hopping. Every talk is the main event — 25 minutes, zero sales pitches.

<!-- @license lucide-static v1.17.0 - ISC -->

</svg>
Half-day deep dives on day two: AI agents, design systems, performance, and more.
A converted factory by the river, live synthwave, and the best pastel de nata in town.
<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M12 0L14.6 9.4L24 12L14.6 14.6L12 24L9.4 14.6L0 12L9.4 9.4L12 0Z" fill="#F59E0B"/></svg>
“The edge is a lie (a useful one)”
<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M12 0L14.6 9.4L24 12L14.6 14.6L12 24L9.4 14.6L0 12L9.4 9.4L12 0Z" fill="#F59E0B"/></svg>
Fábrica Braço de Prata — a 19th-century munitions factory turned culture house on Lisbon's riverfront. Twenty minutes from the airport, five from the best seafood of your life.
Can't make it? Every talk streams live and lands on YouTube the same week.

meta_description: Commit '26 — two days of code, craft & caffeine in Lisbon.
name: commit_home
